name: showTrueFalseQuestion
description: Display one workflow true-or-false understanding check. First speak exactly: Okay, here’s a question. Only after that cue has been spoken, call this tool so the panel changes at that moment. Then immediately speak the supplied statement with no intervening words. Use for the two optional previous-review checks and the three current-lesson knowledge checks.

parameters.description: Only the statement itself. Never begin or end with True or false because the card already displays that heading. Do not include a lead-in, hint, answer, or explanation.
